extract: Hydreigon (Japanese: サザンドラ Sazandora) is a dual-type Dark/Dragon Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Zweilous starting at level 64. It is the final form of Deino. It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans. The Paradox Pokémon Iron Jugulis is said to be a future relative of Hydreigon or a version of it from a parallel timeline.
